原文: Indoor plants① might look as if they just sit around not doing much, but in many ways they are the unsung heroes② of the home. B. Not only do they look beautiful, but studies have shown that they can promote③ people's wellbeing④ by improving their mood(心情), reducing stress⑤ and helping their memory⑥. What's more, indoor plants are easy to look after and are not very expensive⑦.
翻译: 室内植物可能看起来好像只是闲坐着无所事事，但在许多方面，它们是家中默默无闻的英雄。它们不仅看起来漂亮，而且研究表明，它们可以通过改善心情、减轻压力和帮助记忆来促进人们的健康。此外，室内植物易于照料，而且不太昂贵。

原文: Indoor plants, also known as houseplants⑧ or pot plants⑨, are plants that like to grow indoors. Many of these species⑩(物种) are not ideally suited⑪ to growing outside in the UK, especially in the winter. D. Instead, they grow better inside, where it is warmer.
翻译: 室内植物，也被称为室内盆栽植物或盆栽植物，是喜欢在室内生长的植物。这些物种中有许多并不完全适合在英国户外生长，尤其是在冬天。相反，它们在更温暖的室内生长得更好。
必背词汇:
⑧ houseplant /ˈhaʊsplɑːnt/ n. 室内盆栽植物

Ⓡ housework /ˈhaʊswɜːk/ n. 家务
⑨ pot plant /ˈpɒt plɑːnt/ n. 盆栽植物
Ⓡ pot /pɒt/ n. 锅；罐
Ⓡ plant /plɑːnt/ n. 植物 v. 种植
⑩ species /ˈspiːʃiːz/ n. 物种；种类
Ⓡ specific /spəˈsɪfɪk/ adj. 特定的
Ⓡ special /ˈspeʃl/ adj. 特殊的
Ⓡ specimen /ˈspesɪmən/ n. 样本
⑪ suited /ˈsuːtɪd/ adj. 适合的
Ⓡ suit /suːt/ v. 适合 n. 套装
Ⓡ suitable /ˈsuːtəbl/ adj. 合适的
Ⓡ unsuitable /ʌnˈsuːtəbl/ adj. 不合适的

原文: Why are indoor plants good for you?
翻译: 为什么室内植物对你有益？

原文: Will Spoelstra, who works at the Royal Botanic Gardens, says, "C. There are many benefits⑫ to growing plants indoors. I find during the winter months, plants around the house can really lift⑬ your mood." Several studies have backed this up⑭ and found that indoor plants can improve creativity⑮, focus⑯ and memory. There is also research showing that pot plants can clean the air around them by removing⑰ harmful gases, such as carbon dioxide⑱. They also remove some harmful chemicals⑲ from paints or cooking. E. Plants like peace lilies⑳ and devil's ivy㉑ are among the best.
翻译: 在皇家植物园工作的威尔·斯波尔斯特拉说：“在室内种植植物有很多好处。我发现，在冬季的几个月里，房子周围的植物真的能提升你的心情。” 几项研究证实了这一点，并发现室内植物可以提高创造力、注意力和记忆力。还有研究表明，盆栽植物可以通过去除有害气体（如二氧化碳）来净化周围的空气。它们还能去除油漆或烹饪中的一些有害化学物质。像白鹤芋和绿萝这样的植物是最好的之一。

⑫ benefit /ˈbenɪfɪt/ n. 好处 v. 受益

⑳ peace lily /ˈpiːs ˌlɪli/ n. 白鹤芋

原文: Aloe vera㉒, peace lilies and spider plants㉓ are some of the species that are easy to grow indoors. You can buy plants from supermarkets, garden centres㉔ or online. Younger plants are often cheaper than fully grown ones, and you get to care for them as they mature㉕—which is part of the joy of owning plants. "G. Learning about the requirements㉖ of each plant can be very rewarding㉗," Spoelstra says. "It can bring a new interest and focus into people's lives and help to make the link㉘ between home and nature."
翻译: 芦荟、白鹤芋和吊兰是一些易于在室内种植的物种。你可以从超市、园艺中心或网上购买植物。幼株通常比完全成熟的植株便宜，而且你可以在它们成熟的过程中照料它们——这是拥有植物的乐趣之一。斯波尔斯特拉说：“了解每种植物的需求是非常有益的。它可以给人们的生活带来新的兴趣和关注点，并有助于建立家庭与自然之间的联系。”
